title: Pachai Kiligal Tholodu Lyrics Indian
stanzas:
pachchai kiligal tholodu
pattuk kuyilo maniyodu
boologam aanandhin ellai
indha boomikku
kanneer sondham illai (2)

chinna siru
koottukulla sorgam irukku
ada chinna chinna
anbilthaane jeeven
innum irukku

ada paasam mattum
podhum kanne
kaasu panam ennathukku

pachchai kiligal tholodu
pattuk kuyilo maniyodu
boologam aanandhin ellai
indha boomikku
kanneer sondham illai

andha vinnil aanandham
indha mannil aanandham
adi boomi pandhai
mutti vadha pullil
aanantham

vayilin sutham aanandham
mazhayin satham aanandham
ada mazhayil kooda
saayam pogaa vaanavil
aanandham

vazhvil nooraanandham
vazhve peraanandham
penne narai ezhudhum
suyaharidham
adhil anbae aanandham
aananadham

pachchai kiligal tholodu
pattuk kuyilo maniyodu
boologam aanandhin ellai
indha boomikku
kanneer sondham illai

un moochil naan vazhnthaal
en mudhmai aanandham
nee innoru ennai
pettraal innum aanantham

pani kottum mathathil
un vetpam aanandham
en kaadhu varaikkum
kambili pothum
karunai aanantham

sondham ooraanandham
bandham peraanandham
kanne un vizhiyaal
pirar azhuthaal
kanneerum aanandham
aanandham

pachchai kiligal tholodu
pattuk kuyilo maniyodu
boologam aanandhin ellai
indha boomikku
kanneer sondham illai

chinna siru
koottukulla sorgam irukku
ada chinna chinna
anbilthaane jeeven
innum irukku

ada paasam mattum
podhum kanne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Pachai Kiligal Tholodu expresses themes of love and the beauty of nature, evoking a sense of nostalgia.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Indian, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and connection to love and life.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by KJ Yesudas and composed by AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 9, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pachai Kiligal Tholodu, the protagonist reflects on the beauty of love and nature, creating a serene atmosphere. The song's soothing melody, combined with KJ Yesudas's soulful voice, evokes deep emotions and nostalgia. It serves as a poignant reminder of the simple joys of life and love. The lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu enhances the song's impact, making it a cherished piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pachai Kiligal Tholodu from Indian is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of KJ Yesudas and the masterful composition by AR Rahman, this song takes listeners on a soulful journey. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth, making it a timeless classic that resonates with the heart.
stanzaMeanings: Green birds fly, the song of the cuckoo brings joy to the world, there is no sorrow in this earth.
In a small group, there is heaven, oh, in small, small loves, life still exists.
Why is there a need for a song for the gathering of butterflies?
Just love is enough, my dear, what is the need for money?
